name: Blisterwort
description:
Activate 2 (manipulate)

This clear, viscous liquid causes lesions and blisters that spread quickly. The victim's pain response increases and flesh breaks easily under physical stress.

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and weakness 2 to physical and force damage

Stage 2 ] damage and weakness 4 to physical and force damage

Stage 3 ] damage and weakness 6 to physical and force damage
